title: Mike Maggi
compiled_truth: Mike Maggi is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-29 to 2002-05-22), Mike Maggi sent 745 and received 1218 emails, totalling 1963 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Nelson](people/michelle-nelson) (452), [Amanda Rybarski](people/amanda-rybarski) (139), [Amanda Huble](people/amanda-huble) (95), [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (10), [Capstone](people/capstone-texas) (7). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, sent, sent_items, to_do.
